warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose: The most electrophilic Fukui reactivity index (f+) for formaldehyde was computed as 0.70839 at the carbon atom using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP in the gas phase. This methodology employed Mulliken partial charge analysis within PySCF on the formaldehyde geometry from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Convergence and trustworthy integrity were confirmed, and all components of fukui charges (f+, f-, f0) summed perfectly to 1.000, signaling no drift was observed.
